description: Proof append-only and finality vectors. Verifies proof state machine is forward-only, detached proofs are classified correctly, and proof existence does not imply distributed finality.

invariants.append_only: proof state transitions are forward-only; no backwards transitions allowed
invariants.proof_existence_not_finality: a local proof artifact does not constitute distributed finality
invariants.local_valid_not_global_valid: LOCAL_VALID on a single node does not equal GLOBAL_VALID
